sn45.38:1.1:
1
At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, I will teach you brahminhood and the goal of brahminhood. Listen to that …
sn45.38:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is brahminhood? It is this Noble Eightfold Path; that is, right view … right concentration. This is called brahminhood.
sn45.38:1.3: "And what, bhikkhus, is the goal of brahminhood? The destruction of lust, the destruction of hatred, the destruction of delusion. This is called the goal of brahminhood."
